hero.title: Your editing style,
hero.description: Just upload your video. AI analyzes your editing style and auto-generates silence cuts, subtitles, chapters, and MP4. Export project files for FCP, Premiere, or DaVinci in one click.

features.title: What EditClone can do
features.subtitle: AI automates tedious editing work. The more you use it, the more it learns your style.

silence.title: Auto Silence Cutting
silence.description: Detects silences and pauses, reflects cut candidates in FCPXML / Premiere XML automatically.

transcript.title: Whisper Transcription
transcript.description: High-accuracy transcription with OpenAI's Whisper. SRT subtitle files generated automatically.

chapters.title: YouTube Chapter Generation
chapters.description: Auto-generates chapters from speech content. Paste directly into YouTube descriptions.

fcpxml.title: Multi-NLE Export
fcpxml.description: Generate project files for Final Cut Pro, Premiere Pro, and DaVinci Resolve with one click.

mp4.title: Direct MP4 Output
mp4.description: Export silence-cut MP4 directly. Ready for immediate upload to social media.

async.title: AI Editing Instructions
async.description: Give Claude natural language instructions like 'cut the intro greeting' or 'remove all filler words'.

upload.title: Upload Your Video
upload.description: Supports MP4, MOV, M4V formats. Simple drag and drop upload.

analyze.title: AI Analyzes Automatically
analyze.description: Whisper transcribes, ffmpeg detects silence, AI generates chapters and cut suggestions.

download.title: Download and Done
download.description: Get FCPXML, MP4, SRT, and chapters bundled together. Ready to use immediately.

pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.subtitle: No watermarks — quantity limits only. Start free, upgrade anytime.

cta.title: Start Editing Smarter Today
cta.description: Free to sign up. No credit card required. Ready in 1 minute.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Start automating your video editing
signup.terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

account.title: Account
account.pluginDescription: Paste this token in the plugin login screen. The token expires in 1 hour.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Upload a video to start auto-editing
dashboard.noVideosSub: Upload a video to get started

upload.title: Upload Video
upload.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Cut the intro greeting, remove all filler words like "um" and "uh", keep only the funny parts
upload.promptHint: Claude will analyze the transcript and suggest cuts based on your instructions. Leave blank for silence-only cutting.
upload.noiseDbHint: Sensitive (cut small pauses) ← → Lenient (cut long pauses only)

results.title: Editing Complete
results.subtitle: Your files are ready to download
results.mp4Description: Silence-cut MP4 with captions burned in. Ready to upload to social media.
results.editingDescription: Open in FCP / Premiere / DaVinci to add BGM, custom caption styles, and color grading to the pre-cut timeline. Subtitle file (SRT) included.
results.editingNote: ZIP includes: FCPXML, source video, subtitle file (SRT), and chapter text

fcpxml.title: Editing Project File (FCP / Premiere / DaVinci)
fcpxml.description: Open in your editing app to make further adjustments
fcpxml.note: After extracting, relink media in the media/ folder in your editing app

srt.title: Subtitle File (SRT)
srt.description: Add captions to YouTube, TikTok, or Instagram. Also importable as a caption track in your editing app.

chapters.title: YouTube Chapters
chapters.description: Paste directly into your YouTube description to add chapters

transcript.title: Transcript
transcript.description: Full text of everything said in the video

styles.title: Style Profiles
styles.subtitle: Save your editing style and apply it automatically next time
styles.emptySub: Create one with the "New Profile" button
styles.refineNoFeedback: Add feedback or reference videos to improve accuracy

form.name: Profile name
form.defaultPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Cut the intro greeting, remove all filler words

referenceVideos.title: Reference Videos
referenceVideos.unsupportedError: Only YouTube and Vimeo URLs are supported.

processing.title: Editing...
processing.subtitle: AI is analyzing and editing your video (may take a few minutes)
